title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Steel - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Tata Steel - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!
